series_metadata.series_title: Ohio Auctioneer Commission Auction School Approvals
series_metadata.series_description: Records include initial auction school requests and requests for re-approval received by the Ohio Auctioneer Commission, including but not limited to, correspondence, police back ground checks, curriculum, textbooks, certificates, and application letter.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Electronic: application is approved or denied ; Paper: application is approved or denied
